goldAnswer: The researcher’s main fields of research are software engineering and distributed systems, with strong emphasis on software architecture, cloud computing, microservices, resilience, self-adaptive systems, DevOps, and related applications of generative AI.

goldAnswer.title: Developing Self-Adaptive Microservice Systems: Challenges and Directions
goldAnswer.justification: Directly addresses microservice systems and focuses on self-adaptation challenges and research directions, making it highly relevant to microservices architecture.

goldAnswer.title: Microservices: The Journey So Far and Challenges Ahead
goldAnswer.justification: Provides a broad architectural view of microservices, including the state of the field and key open challenges, which makes it a foundational recommendation for this topic.

goldAnswer.title: Building orchestrated microservice systems using declarative business processes
goldAnswer.justification: Focuses on how to structure and orchestrate microservice systems, which is directly relevant to architectural design and implementation concerns.
